validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_release_readiness.py
validation_results.summary: Release readiness packets validate complete clean evidence, missing gate blocking, preview cycle prevention, canonical readiness hash, dirty-state policy, and semantic boundary.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_release_readiness.py repository/tests/p4/test_release_lock_boundary.py
validation_results.summary: Readiness preview forbids bundle_hash and release_readiness_packet_hash, and release lock input bundles reference readiness hash without embedding readiness packets.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_release_lock_boundary.py
validation_results.summary: Release lock input bundles are hash-bound candidate inputs that require P4 spec/build evidence and human authorization while rejecting release lock creation, package publication, embedded readiness packets, and written lock paths.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_release_readiness.py
validation_results.summary: Dirty state policy accepts clean and documented excluded dirty records, but blocks release-input dirty records, unclassified records, and BLOCKED_DIRTY states.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests/p4/test_release_readiness.py repository/tests/p4/test_release_lock_boundary.py
validation_results.summary: Release readiness and lock input validators reject product semantics, page elements, layout rules, business contracts, and deduced product requirements.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository python -m drd_harness.cli.main runtime-boundary-check repository/src
validation_results.summary: Runtime source has no construction authority imports or direct construction authority path reads.

validation_results.command: PYTHONPATH=. uv run --project repository --with pytest pytest repository/tests
validation_results.summary: Full repository test suite passed with 480 tests.
